docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,304.93 FILED BY STONE, CORA GREENE, GERALD AS TO DEFENDANT SF TOW LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-06-2026 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-06-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT SF TOW LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) WILLIAM LOPEZ, MANAGING MEMBER FILED BY DEFENDANT SF TOW LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-06-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-06-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF CORA STONE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF GERALD GREEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SF TOW LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY WILLAM LOPEZ, MANAGING MEMBER. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STONE, CORA GREENE, GERALD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SF TOW LLC JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT V. PLAINTIFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
